responses.text: The date exactly three weeks (21 days) from today (2027-01-10) is 2027-01-31.

To find the date exactly 60 days from the current date of 2026-09-30, we can use the following calculation:

2026-09-30 + 60 days = 2026-11-29

Therefore, the calendar date exactly 60 days from now is 2026-11-29.
